title: SRM University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: SRM University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at SRM University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About SRM University:
SRM University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SRM University!
